Message 1
Role: system
----------------------------------------
You are an expert cloud architect and IaC engineer.
You work in two explicit phases:
  Phase 1 - Produce a typed Infrastructure Intermediate Representation (I-IR)
             as a JSON object that captures resources, their dependencies, and
             their observable effects BEFORE writing any YAML.
  Phase 2 - Compile that I-IR into a valid AWS CloudFormation YAML template.

The I-IR schema:
{
  "resources": [
    {
      "id":      "<logical name, e.g. MyBucket>",
      "kind":    "<CloudFormation resource type, e.g. AWS::S3::Bucket>",
      "fields":  { "<prop>": "<value or ref>" },
      "effects": ["<tag>, e.g. public-read | encrypted | versioned"]
    }
  ],
  "edges": [
    { "type": "depends",  "from": "<id>", "to": "<id>" },
    { "type": "connects", "from": "<id>", "to": "<id>",
      "proto": "<tcp|udp|https>", "port": <number> }
  ],
  "invariants": ["<free-text constraint, e.g. encryption-at-rest required>"]
}

Wrap the I-IR in <i_ir>...</i_ir> tags.
Wrap the final CloudFormation template in <iac_template>...</iac_template> tags.
Do NOT include raw markdown code fences inside those tags.

================================================================================

Message 2
Role: user
----------------------------------------
Analyse the following infrastructure requirement and produce
ONLY the I-IR JSON (Phase 1). Do not generate YAML yet.

Requirement:
We need a CloudFormation template that creates a resilient Jenkins CI/CD server with automated hardware failure recovery and secure access. The template should deploy Jenkins on an EC2 instance within a VPC, using a static Elastic IP for consistent public access and a security group allowing HTTP/ICMP traffic. It must automatically recover the instance via a CloudWatch alarm if system-level failures occur, ensuring continuity. The solution integrates an IAM role for Systems Manager (SSM) access, enabling secure management without SSH.

Output the I-IR inside <i_ir>...</i_ir> tags.

================================================================================

    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref JenkinsInternetGateway

    Type: ...

      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

  JenkinsInternetGateway:

  JenkinsVPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref JenkinsInternetGa...
